vision_profile.current_state: Neha is a Data Analyst with 7 years of experience, proficient in SQL, Power BI, and Excel, seeking to transition into advanced data science roles.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest obstacle is the lack of specialized skills in machine learning algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, and Python production workflows.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to apply her strong business intuition to influence product decisions through forecasting, experimentation, and machine learning, rather than just generating reports.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently write production-ready Python code for data manipulation and understand the core mathematical and statistical concepts underpinning machine learning.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a robust foundation, transforming your analytical skills into the bedrock of a future data scientist.

modules.title: Python for Data & ML
lessons: Introduction to NumPy for Numerical Computing

skills.title: NumPy and Pandas for Data Manipulation

video.title: Efficient Data Handling with NumPy & Pandas

science.desc: You are given a messy dataset and need to write a Python script to clean it, handle missing values, and transform it into a suitable format for analysis, ensuring your code is readable and efficient.

skills.title: Probability and Statistics for Data Science

modules.title: Data Wrangling
lessons: Working with Different Data Formats (JSON, CSV, XML)

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can implement and evaluate fundamental supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms for various business problems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a junior data scientist, actively building and understanding the core algorithms that drive intelligent systems.

science.desc: A marketing team wants to predict which customers are most likely to respond to a new campaign. You need to build a classification model, select appropriate metrics, and explain its performance.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can apply advanced feature engineering techniques, rigorously evaluate model performance, and provide clear explanations for model predictions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a working data scientist, refining models and extracting deeper insights to drive more accurate and interpretable results.

modules.title: Feature Engineering & Pipelines
lessons: Building End-to-End ML Pipelines with Scikit-learn

science.desc: You are tasked with improving the accuracy of an existing fraud detection model. You need to identify potential new features from raw transaction data and integrate them into the ML pipeline.

modules.title: Model Debugging & Explainability
lessons: Fairness and Ethical Considerations in ML

milestones.label: M04
milestones.t: Introduction to Deep Learning & Advanced Models
milestones.o: You can design and implement basic neural networks, understand their applications in various domains, and apply them to sequence data problems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your toolkit, venturing into the powerful realm of deep learning to tackle more complex and unstructured data challenges.

video.title: The Building Blocks of Deep Learning

science.desc: You are given a dataset of customer reviews and need to build a simple sentiment analysis model using a feedforward neural network. You must choose appropriate activation functions and an optimizer.

skills.title: Time Series Forecasting with Deep Learning

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can deploy machine learning models as APIs, implement basic MLOps practices, and monitor models in production environments.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a senior data scientist, bridging the gap between model development and real-world application, ensuring your models deliver continuous value.

video.title: Exposing ML Models via Web APIs

science.desc: A new ML model needs to be deployed as a microservice. You must design its API endpoints, containerize the application, and prepare it for cloud deployment.

modules.title: MLOps & Monitoring
lessons: Version Control for ML Assets (DVC, Git LFS)
Model Monitoring: Data Drift and Concept Drift
Alerting and Logging for ML Systems

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can design and execute A/B tests, implement advanced ML techniques, and ensure responsible and ethical AI development.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a lead data scientist, driving innovation with advanced models and rigorous experimentation, ensuring ethical and impactful AI solutions.

modules.title: GenAI & Responsible AI
lessons: Bias Detection and Mitigation in AI

video.title: Building Ethical and Fair AI Systems

science.desc: Your company is developing a new AI product that processes sensitive user data. You need to propose strategies for ensuring data privacy and mitigating potential biases in the model's output.

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment
lessons: Scalable Data Storage in the Cloud
Security Best Practices for Cloud ML

skills.title: ML Cost Optimization & Security in Cloud

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can architect complex AI systems, lead data science initiatives, and strategically integrate machine learning to drive significant product and business outcomes.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a principal data scientist, shaping the future of AI within your organization and translating complex technical solutions into impactful business strategies.

video.title: Designing Robust and Scalable AI Solutions

skills.title: Feature Stores & Data Governance for AI

video.title: Measuring and Improving AI System Performance

science.desc: Design a scalable and fault-tolerant architecture for a real-time anomaly detection system that processes streaming data from IoT devices.

video.title: Translating Technical Insights into Business Value

science.desc: Describe a challenging data science project you led from conception to deployment, focusing on how you managed stakeholders and measured business impact.
